Plant Journal

Train a plant classifier, identify your plants, and save check-ins with care tips.

Allow camera access when prompted.

Loading MobileNet…

Train from video (ffmpeg)

Record or upload a short clip of your potted plant. ffmpeg extracts frames; each frame becomes a training sample for the active class.

Or run npm run extract-frames -- your-plant.mp4 locally, then import the JPEG folder.

Point your plant at the camera, then identify.

Prediction

Checking Ollama…

Care for —

Select a journal entry or plant to see care tips.
